title: Spec documents outdated lockout duration
expectedBehavior: The spec should reflect the current lockout duration of 600,000 ms.
observedBehavior: The spec states lockoutDuration is 300,000 ms, while the current approved code uses 600,000 ms.

deterministicFacts.statement: The spec states lockoutDuration is 300,000 ms.
The implementation sets lockoutDuration to 600,000 ms.
The approved change record establishes 600,000 ms as the intended duration and requests a documentation update.

inference: The approved lockout duration was increased from 300,000 to 600,000 ms, but the spec was not updated.
